Gregory E. Montes urban history and travel collection
Montes, Gregory E.
8035
6.2 cubic feet. 6.2 cubic feet.
1798-1960. Printed Materials, Publications Travel brochures, city guides, maps, books of views, postcards, and related materials. Collection material in English 6678198
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Travel brochures, city guides, maps, books of views, postcards, and related materials documenting world cities and tourism in the 19th and 20th centuries. The Montes collection also includes more than 1,000 books (most cataloged separately and searchable in the library catalog) on world cities and urban areas, the majority published between 1798 and 1960.
NOTES
Donated by Gregory E. Montes in memory of Dr. Gustavo E. and Marica S. Montes.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Books United States Non-United States General, Africa, Asia, Australia/Oceania, Europe, North America
Series II. Guides United States Non-United States General, Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America
Series III. Postcards United States Non-United States General, Africa, Asia, Australia/Oceania, Europe, North America, South America
Series IV. Additional Items, Miscellaneous, Ephemera Posters, Artwork
Cite As:
